_readme: T-1.1 SECTION-SET ASSERTION.
The harness cannot mount AliJeVroceERA5 itself — the selected date and the two
station signals are internal signals with no external entry point (the only date
control is prev/next-day buttons, TodayCard.tsx:90-110). So the harness mirrors
the page's composition instead, and a section added to the page would otherwise
be silently absent from the snapshot: no error, no miss, just a number that stops
being watched.
This file closes that hole. scripts/snapshot/main.mjs extracts every capitalised
JSX tag from code/ali-je-vroce-era5/AliJeVroceERA5.tsx and requires each one to
appear in exactly one bucket below. An unclassified tag FAILS THE RUN and no
snapshot is written.
Adding a section to the page is therefore a two-line change here plus whatever
capture it needs — and forgetting is not an option the harness allows.
`covered` entries name the harness unit that renders them, so the mirror is
auditable against the page rather than taken on trust.
LIMIT: this assertion sees CAPITALISED TAGS ONLY, so it is blind to numbers the

page renders itself in bare
/

— the distribution chart's title and footer
(AliJeVroceERA5.tsx:99-112) and the station count (:137-145). Those are covered
instead by the mirrored-source assertion in scripts/snapshot/main.mjs, which is
where both limits are written up in full.

TodayCard.captures: category, percentile, temperature, sample count, year range, the ERA5T/preliminarno badge, explain + footer copy, gauge and last-7 chart options

DistributionChart.captures: distribution curve points, percentile zone bands, cutoff plotlines

TodayTrendChart.captures: Theil-Sen slope, p-value, tau, n years, projection endpoints, and the current-year plotline label (TodayTrendChart.tsx:69-80) — a former clock leak that must now follow the pinned date

RegToolbar.captures: the control state the rest of the analysis panel is computed from (variable, method, window, day label)

RegScatterCard.captures: trend per decade, total change over record, significance label, fit description, per-year scatter and anomalies

RegYearRoundCard.captures: trend10 and p_val for all 365 days of the year, keyed MM-DD

StationMap.captures: station marker set. Displays no numbers of its own; rendered so the Highcharts topology fixture (StationMap.tsx:45-46) is actually exercised rather than merely recorded

HeroCardsPanel.captures: impact category, trend headline number, verdict copy, significance stars, sample counts

Era5SeasonHeatmapChart.captures: per-season per-year average, percentile, category, rank

SpeiHeatmapChart.captures: national SPEI per season-year, category, water balance, rank

SpeiTrendChartLazy.captures: per-station SPEI-3/SPEI-30 series and Theil-Sen trend parameters

Era5TropicalChart.captures: per-year counts, NB-GLM trend, and the highlighted current-year bar (TropicalChart.tsx:73-76) — the second former clock leak

structural.Dashboard: Local layout wrapper for the whole page (AliJeVroceERA5.tsx:43). The harness mirrors its composition; it renders no numbers itself.
structural.Era5Charts: Local layout wrapper for the lower sections (AliJeVroceERA5.tsx:207). Renders no numbers itself.
structural.TropControls: Threshold and streak inputs (AliJeVroceERA5.tsx:181). Their VALUES are pinned in cases.json analysis_defaults and drive the tropical captures; the control markup itself displays no data.
structural.RegressionPanel: Context provider only (RegressionPanel.tsx:121). Supplies the analysis store to the cards, renders no DOM of its own.
structural.SiteMeta: NOT a component. A type argument in createResource<SiteMeta> (AliJeVroceERA5.tsx:35) that the tag regex cannot distinguish from JSX. Classified explicitly rather than special-cased in the extractor, so the extractor stays dumb and auditable.

SeaLevelChart.reason: NOT SNAPSHOTTED. Its displayed figures — flooded hectares and affected buildings per sea-level increment — come from the same-origin /data/flood-stats.json plus the per-cm factors 20.77 ha and 14.13 buildings (SeaLevelWidget.tsx:56-57,109), none of which are part of the T-1.2 ERA5 fixture set. It also eagerly constructs 24 image preloads and a Leaflet map against external tiles.
SeaLevelChart.consequence: Every number the sea-level widget displays is currently OUTSIDE the regression net. A Phase 2 or Phase 3 change that moved one of them would produce an empty T-1.1 diff.
tickets: T-4.11 (D-10c) — BLOCKING: the widget renders 10 cm increments from a SRTM-derived DEM whose vertical error is metre-scale, so the lower half of its range sits inside the DEM's own error. The widget does not launch on the current DEM, and may be cut from v1 entirely.
T-4.10 (D-10b) — the 20.77 / 14.13 factors and the AR6 per-SSP tables are unattributed.
T-5.6 — the widget is 162 KB and is to be lazy-loaded on interaction.
SeaLevelChart.if_the_widget_ships: Extend the T-1.2 fixture matrix to cover /data/flood-stats.json, then add a global.sea_level unit here. Do not baseline it before T-4.11 resolves — the numbers are expected to change or disappear.
